migrate_existing_users.error.failed_to_m: Failed to migrate your account. Please try again.
migrate_existing_users.error.google_acco: An account is already registered with this email address. Please use a different Google profile to connect an existing Niantic account or continue with your current email.
migrate_existing_users.error.apple_accou: An account is already registered with this email address. Please use a different Apple profile to connect an existing Niantic account or continue with your current email.
migrate_existing_users.error.missing_goo: We couldn't find any Niantic accounts with this Google profile. You can continue with your current email and add this login method from your profile page, or use a different Google profile to connect an existing Niantic account.
migrate_existing_users.error.missing_app: We couldn't find any Niantic accounts with this Apple profile. You can continue with your current email and add this login method from your profile page, or use a different Apple profile to connect an existing Niantic account.
migrate_existing_users_complete_view.alt: Graphic of hands raised in celebration
migrate_existing_users_complete_view.tha: Your account has been updated to use Niantic ID.
migrate_existing_users_complete_view.vie: You can now review new updates on your profile.
migrate_existing_users_connect_email_vie: You can continue to use your current email address to log in to 8thwall.com and it will serve as your new Niantic Identity moving forward.
You won’t be able to connect any other Niantic ID you may have to this account after your press confirm.
migrate_existing_users_modal.error: Oops! Something went wrong! Please refresh your page and try again.
migrate_existing_users_select_account_vi: Connect Your Niantic Identity with your 8th Wall Account
Connect your existing Niantic ID from Pokémon Go, Monster Hunter Now, and other Niantic titles or create a new Niantic ID using your current email address and password.
migrate_existing_users_start_view.headin: 8th Wall is moving to Niantic Identity!
migrate_existing_users_start_view.descri: We're upgrading to Niantic Identity - the same login provider as Niantic Games and Services. This change modernizes login, connects you to the Niantic ecosystem, and paves the way for future improvements.
migrate_existing_users_start_view.bullet: Seamlessly access 8th Wall and Niantic games like Pokémon Go & Monster Hunter Now with one set of credentials.
Easily login via Google, Apple, or email.
Updating your account takes only 3 minutes!
